name: Nice & Easy Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Grease 12 muffin cups with butter or non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the self-rising flour, milk, and mayonnaise.
4. Stir the ingredients until just moistened.
5. Divide the batter into 12 equal portions and place one in each muffin cup.
6. Bake for 20 minutes.
